title: IncidentAiDlqEvent
description: Published to incident.ai.dlq when AI processing fails after retry exhaustion.

originalTopic.description: Kafka topic the original event was consumed from.

incidentId.description: Identifier of the incident that failed processing.

errorMessage.description: Error description from the last failed attempt.

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts before routing to DLQ.

failedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the final failure.

traceId.description: Distributed trace identifier propagated from the originating event. Optional for backward compatibility.
